---
title: "dictionaries"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`dictionaries.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/dictionaries.py)
:::


## API Reference

### `NestedDict` {#nesteddict}

```python
class NestedDict(defaultdict)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/dictionaries.py#L6){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `NestedDict.__init__` {#nesteddict-__init__}

```python
def __init__(self, *args, **kwargs)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/dictionaries.py#L7){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `NestedDict.to_dict` {#nesteddict-to_dict}

```python
def to_dict(self) -> dict
```

Convert the nested defaultdict structure into a plain dict.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/dictionaries.py#L14){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `NestedDict.__repr__` {#nesteddict-__repr__}

```python
def __repr__(self)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/dictionaries.py#L19){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `NestedDict.__getitem__` {#nesteddict-__getitem__}

```python
def __getitem__(self, key)
```

Extended access:
  - if key is a list/tuple, traverse nested levels
  - else, behave like defaultdict

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/dictionaries.py#L22){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `NestedDict.__setitem__` {#nesteddict-__setitem__}

```python
def __setitem__(self, key, value)
```

Extended assignment:
  - if key is a list/tuple, traverse nested levels and assign value
  - else, behave like defaultdict

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/dictionaries.py#L36){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `NestedDict.get_key_combinations` {#nesteddict-get_key_combinations}

```python
def get_key_combinations(self, parent_keys=None, max_depth=None, current_depth=0) -> List
```

Recursively extract all key combinations from a nested dictionary,
with optional depth limiting.

Args:
    parent_keys (list): Used internally for recursion.
    max_depth (int, optional): Maximum depth to traverse.
    current_depth (int): Current recursion depth (internal).

Returns:
    list[list[str]]: List of key paths.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/dictionaries.py#L51){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `NestedDict.loop` {#nesteddict-loop}

```python
def loop(combinations: List, fun: Callable)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/dictionaries.py#L90){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
